results.rendered_html:
abhidhyai 1 P. (epic 2 P.)
1 To meditate upon, reflect, consider, think of; yadabhidhyāmyahaṃ śaśvacchubhaṃ vā yadi vāśubhaṃ  Mb. 
2 To covet, wish or desire for;  Y. 3. 134.
